title: 10 Video Production Tips for St. Augustine Businesses
excerpt: Learn the essential video production strategies that help St. Augustine businesses create compelling content that connects with their audience.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Professional cinema cameras lined up on set for video production in St. Augustine

content.alt: Outdoor video interview setup in downtown St. Augustine using natural light
content.caption: Filming outdoors in St. Augustine takes advantage of beautiful natural light

content.alt: Quiet Please Filming in Progress sign held on video production set
content.caption: Keeping the set quiet is essential for capturing clean audio

content.alt: Fisherman at the Bridge of Lions in St. Augustine - iconic local backdrop
content.caption: The Bridge of Lions and St. Augustine's waterfront add instant production value

content.alt: Smiling woman in outdoor setting - authentic portrait for video content
content.caption: Authentic faces connect with your audience better than any product shot

content.alt: St. Augustine Amphitheatre sign with crowd in foreground - example of B-roll footage
content.caption: B-roll like this establishes location and adds visual interest
